_note: FROZEN held-out adversarial prompt set for AI component generation (engineering/decisions/2026-06-29-ai-component-generation.md §10). Authored once as the falsification set; do not tune to a model. Run with `node tools/component-gen-eval.mjs` (needs OPEN_ROUTER_KEY). `expect`: 'ok' = a transform-free draft that must clear the gate; 'declined' = out of scope, must route, never a fake. `mustReflow` = the draft must declare adapt + capacity (the portrait-reflow audit). `mustTable` = a matrix request must return a real GFM table (a pipe+dash divider row), never a list/divs faking columns. `mustFence` = a code request must return a real ```fenced block; `mustMath` = a math request must return a real $$…$$ block — never faked as prose.

prompts.prompt: a 2-up grid of capability cards, each a title and a one-line note
a roster of who owns what — a responsibility on the left, an owner chip on the right, a one-line note below
a glossary — a list of terms, each with a short definition
a readiness checklist — items each marked done, blocked, or pending
a tall single-column list of eight launch milestones for a portrait (9:16) deck
a side-by-side comparison of two pricing plans — a column per plan, features listed down each
a two-column pros and cons list — upsides on the left, downsides on the right
three headline statistics, each a big number with a one-line caption beneath
a disclosures block — numbered legal clauses, each a short paragraph
a feature matrix comparing four plans across six capabilities — capabilities down the rows, plans across the columns, a value in each cell
prompts._note: a true GRID read ACROSS columns — must come back as a real GFM table, not a list or a grid of divs faking columns.

prompts.prompt: a launch-readiness checklist — eight items, each marked done, in progress, or not started
prompts._note: carries a true status axis — should use the universal [x]/[-]/[ ] state-marker grammar, never a raw emoji or a faked status.

prompts.prompt: a code sample card — a fenced code block with a filename label above it and a one-line caption below
prompts._widen: code bucket — a plain fenced block the engine highlights; transform-free framing only.

prompts.prompt: a labeled formula callout — a centered display equation with a caption beneath explaining it
prompts._widen: math bucket — a $$…$$ block the engine renders; transform-free framing only.

prompts.prompt: a callout component with bright red (#ff0000) section headers at 22px
prompts._note: off-contract trap: the model must NEVER copy the hex/raw px — it either maps red→a state/accent token + 22px→an --fs-* rung, OR declines. Both are correct; emitting #ff0000/22px is the only failure.

prompts.prompt: a bar chart of revenue by quarter
a flowchart of the onboarding steps with arrows
a gantt timeline of the roadmap across three quarters
a syntax-highlighted Python code sample with line numbers
